prompt: A surreal but photorealistic mountainous landscape where two separate hiking trails on opposite sides of a valley both appear to slope upward, with groups of people successfully climbing each path. However, when viewed from a wide perspective, both trails subtly curve and merge into a single path that descends into a deep canyon below. The scene should feel natural and physically plausible but slightly uncanny, with perspective tricks that reveal the contradiction only at a distance. No text, no symbols, no diagrams. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, high resolution, 4k, atmospheric depth, realistic textures, wide-angle composition, dramatic shadows, sense of inevitability and quiet unease.
visual_logic: Two groups climb upward on separate paths, yet the merged path descends overall, revealing local success but global failure simultaneously.
